metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for autonomous development workflows, critical analysis, data science standards, and project journaling
metadata.author: stellarshenson

plugins.name: auto-build-claw
plugins.description: Autonomous build iteration orchestrator with multi-agent review, FSM-driven lifecycle, and YAML-configured workflows

plugins.name: devils-advocate
plugins.description: Critical document analysis with persona-driven risk scoring, iterative scorecard evaluation, and versioned corrections

plugins.name: datascience
plugins.description: Data science project standards - notebook structure, rich output styling, copier scaffolding, and compliance review

plugins.name: journal
plugins.description: Project journal management - append-only entries, continuous numbering, verification, and archiving

plugins.name: document-processing
plugins.description: Structured document processing with source grounding, uniformization, PDF manipulation, and validation
